pattern: Each hidden digit is independently maximized subject to the valid-time bounds, with the tens-of-hours digit constraining the units-of-hours choice.
hints: Decide each '?' from left to right, always picking the largest digit that still allows a valid time.
The first hour digit can be 2 only if the second hour digit will stay 0-3; otherwise it is 1.
Handle the four positions case by case: hour tens (2 unless units forces 1), hour units (3 if tens is 2 else 9), minute tens (5), minute units (9).

edge_inputs.description: both hour digits hidden plus minute units
leading hour zero forces units up to 9
hour tens hidden with units 5 forces 1
fully hidden time gives the maximum
hour tens hidden with units 3 still allows 2

stress.description: random valid masked times built from a valid base by hiding digits
